_doc: Example sidecar for the PDF produced by examples/make_sample_pdf.py. Keys starting with '_' are ignored.

colors._doc: Optional overrides/additions; [r, g, b] with components in 0..1.

comments.title: Overstated claim
comments.body: No system guarantees complete accuracy. Rephrase to describe what was measured.

comments.title: Date the reference
comments.body: Replace the relative date with an explicit year. Page omitted: all pages are searched.

comments.title: Image placement
comments.body: Rect anchor over the gray box: use for logos, charts, and image-only text.

comments.title: Why 14 days?
comments.body: Custom severity defined in the colors header. Was a longer window considered?

comments.anchor_text: text that does not exist in the sample
comments.title: Fallback demonstration
comments.body: This anchor never matches, so it becomes a sticky note at the top-left of page 2 and `apply` exits with code 1.
